description: Create a TypeScript module 'topologicalSort.ts' at the repo root exporting a 'topologicalSort(graph: Record<string, string[]>): string[] | null' function. The graph is an adjacency list where graph[u] is the array of nodes u points to (u must finish before any of its targets). Return any valid topological order — a permutation of the keys where every edge u→v has u listed before v — as a string array. Return null if the graph contains any cycle (including self-loops and cycles within a larger graph). Disconnected components are handled. The empty graph returns []. The input must not be mutated. Tests in tests/topologicalSort.test.ts must pass.
